decision_reason: PR #36710 is OPEN and NOT merged as of capture. Latest upstream release v1.18.3 (2026-07-16) predates any possible merge and does not contain the feature. Installed CLI is v1.18.1. No released channel provides equivalent functionality, so the build adopts the upstream-compatible design from an isolated source checkout/fork; the installed binary is never patched and no raw-SQL cleaner touches the live DB.

installed_cli.note: Installed via supported channel; not patched or mutated in this step.

source_strategy.approach: isolated upstream checkout/fork outside the configuration repo

local_toolchain.tsgo: absent locally (resolved as devDependency via bun install)

test_command.context_note: Run inside the isolated source checkout pinned to PR head 04954f8b after bun install + turbo build of dependencies. Existing upstream test imports { describe, expect } from bun:test and uses Effect + drizzle-orm; package @opencode-ai/core v1.17.20 at head.

db_baseline.schema_user_version: DEFERRED - live database was NOT opened in this preliminary step (hard constraint). Capture later via content-free PRAGMA user_version / schema_version read-only query only (Phase 5.1/6.1); never by reading content columns.
db_baseline.known_from_spec: size ~19.185 GiB; freelist_count=0; growth is retained payload not free-page slack.

revalidation_rule: Any head/base SHA change, force-push, rebase, new review or merge, or fetched-diff-hash change invalidates this decision and requires re-review (Phase 1.2). PR number and branch names are mutable references.
next_step: Phase 1.2 (review upstream reference algorithm). Do NOT create the checkout or RED tests until Phase 1.2-1.4 complete.
